title: Directive resolution occurs outside the model control loop
method: Imported the built perseus.py artifact and called render_source() in-process while spying on socket.connect, http.client request, and urllib.urlopen — the only egress paths by which any model client (remote API or local Ollama) could be contacted. Call count asserted == 0 across full resolution of @read/@env/@query directives.
patent_linkage: Claim element (f): the resolver selects and expands author-specified directives deterministically and prior to model invocation. Unlike agentic tool-calling, the model does not emit tool-call tokens or decide which directives fire. This defeats the §103 combination of MCP/observability + agentic tool-calling: that combination keeps the model in the loop, the opposite of this teaching.
